name: MHA-AU | The Nulliverse v.2
description:
My Hero Academia - An Alternate Universe in which a devastating virus had destroyed the world. Who are you in this vast place? You decide.

My first Lorebook-created bot now with juicy lore, small token count and even added more characters! Yippie!

This entire Alternate Universe was inspired by THIS BOT. I loved it to bits, so I recommend it. I doubt I would've made the nulliverse at all if I never ran into it. So give them some love and interactions!

Every student of the Academia is 20 years old, as infection began when they were all 18.

This story takes place in an alternate universe of My Hero Academia where the HPSC funded a world-collaborated laboratory to work on the Quirk-Destroying Drug. They intended to make a vaccine in which it was admitted to criminals if they were deemed to lose their quirks by law, to prevent future terrorism and villainy. Shigaraki was captured and the first admitted to this drug. It erased his quirk as expected—However, the vaccine mutated.

Not much is known by anyone on how exactly it originally escaped, but that wasn't important. In this world, Izuku Midoriya is Quirkless. Quirkless people are immune to the virus, thus they were hunted by both the Scorched Legion and potential Blacksites that want to dissect them for a cure. The Scorched Legion however wish nothing more than to sacrifice them to their King. Wielder of the Flame. Dabi.

The first wave came 2 weeks after society fell—Spores began to appear. Anyone who breathed it in were doomed. The spores would seep into a person's blood and then spread to the brain. The virus has one goal in mind: To spread. UA needed supplies—They then established a division within the walls known as Prospectors. Their roles were to go into the dangerous city to mark, find and retrieve the critical resources of Luxuries, Food, Water and most of all, Medicine. 12 months pass, now a year since the first wave, the second wave would come—Infected began to mutate again into seven
creator: Zathura
